message:
test(doctor_frankentui): bd-3bxhj.1.6 comprehensive semantic contract tests

Add ~870 lines of additional test coverage for the semantic contract
infrastructure: malformed JSON rejection for all 4 contract types,
boundary validation, cross-reference integrity, clause/validator
lookup edge cases, and policy matrix projection completeness.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
